title: Cliffortia flabellifolia
taxonomy: Cliffortia flabellifolia belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa. Cliffortia flabellifolia is classified under the genus Cliffortia, a group of plants commonly known as cliffortias. This genus is part of the order Sapindales, which includes trees and shrubs with simple leaves and small fruits. Cliffortia flabellifolia's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Sapindaceae family.
uses: Cliffortia flabellifolia is a plant species native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. Unfortunately, there is limited information available on its medicinal uses.
